requests.description: Batch of the embeddings requests to run using async-queue

oneOf.description: Batch of text values to embed

pooling.description: The pooling method used in the embedding process. `cls` pooling will generate more accurate embeddings on larger inputs - however, embeddings created with cls pooling are not compatible with embeddings generated with mean pooling. The default pooling method is `mean` in order for this to not be a breaking change, but we highly suggest using the new `cls` pooling for better accuracy.
